objective: Fix Price Matrix extraction to use hybrid pipeline (Cheerio noise reduction → Ollama structured extraction) and test on all 64 stored HTML files.
completed_this_session: Updated text-extraction.ts: added postTitle parameter to LLM prompt so implicit product names (e.g., '가족계정' → 'YouTube Premium 가족계정') are resolved from the ad title
Added filterCrossPairedArtifacts() to remove LLM cross-pairing errors (e.g., price from 가족계정 section paired with 개인계정 name)
Updated request-handler.ts:146 to pass parsed.title to runTextExtraction()
Created scripts/re-extract-price-matrix.ts — re-processes all HTML files and writes clean records to SQLite
Created scripts/test-full-pipeline.ts — tests all 64 unique HTML files across all test directories
Price Matrix: 566 junk entries → 12 clean entries (0 junk, 0 empty, 0 missing price, 0 missing duration)
All 5 curated test vendors pass: 구독플레이스 (1 prod), 기프티콩 (7 prod), 다시봄을 (1 prod), DENMARK (3 prod), 행복shms (1 prod)
Fixed test expectation in test-all-vendors.ts: '프리미엄' → 'YouTube Premium' (LLM now uses English names)

lib/competitor-intel/extraction/text-ext: Added postTitle?: string parameter to runTextExtraction()
Updated PRODUCT_EXTRACTION_PROMPT to include title context for product name inference
key_changes.scripts/re-extract-price-matrix.ts: NEW — re-extracts DB with title-aware pipeline

current_task: Re-running test-full-pipeline.ts with updated productsLookJunk heuristic. Added detection for field labels (가격, 이용 기간, 기간, 할인, 쿠폰) that get incorrectly paired with nearby prices by HTML text block parser. Check: cat /tmp/claude-1000/-parent-marketing-automation/7a0fc7f3-6789-440b-ac4a-f65fca7305d6/tasks/bd4ulq0gs.output

known_issues.cross_pairing_heuristic: filterCrossPairedArtifacts uses substring/shared-prefix matching — works well for 가족계정/개인계정 variants but may miss edge cases. Monitor for false positives in full 64-file run.
known_issues.llm_model: Using qwen2.5vl:7b (ENV.OLLAMA_OCR_MODEL). Results may vary with different models.
known_issues.field_label_junk_detection: ADDED 2026-05-11: regex /가[\s]?격|이용\s?기간|기\s?간|할인|쿠폰/ detects field labels that get incorrectly paired with prices. This should fix the -테크몽- case where 13 HTML products included entries like '- 가 격', '이용 기간' etc.

test_files.additional_59: Found in test-pipeline-1page-v2 and other test directories — same extraction pipeline, different vendors/ads. See scripts/test-full-pipeline.ts TEST_DIRS array for all paths.

commands_to_run_next: If incomplete, re-run: npx tsx scripts/test-full-pipeline.ts
Fix any failing vendors and re-run
